message:
test(search): pin federated-merge determinism + enrich lexical-fail-open artifact contract

Two tests tighten the invariants that the just-landed federated merge
refactor (deterministic sort) and the documented hybrid-fail-open
contract depend on.

src/search/query.rs — unit test:
- `search_federated_tantivy`'s existing unit test asserted the
  returned hit count and that the expected paths appeared. It did not
  assert stable order across repeated runs, which is the property the
  new merge-policy refactor is supposed to guarantee.
- Capture the first-run hit order as a 4-tuple per hit
  `(source_path, line_number, content, score.to_bits())` — using
  `score.to_bits()` gives byte-exact float comparison across runs.
  Re-run `client.search("shared federated needle", ...)` three times
  and assert the tuple sequence matches on every attempt. The
  assertion message names the attempt so a flake points at the exact
  iteration.

tests/search_asset_simulation.rs:
- The "robot-style" integration demo scenario serialized a legacy
  fail-open artifact that recorded the tier as a single
  `"mode": "lexical_fail_open"` string. That shape predates the
  documented contract fields
  (`requested_search_mode`, `realized_search_mode`,
  `semantic_refinement`, `fallback_tier`, `fallback_reason`) that
  agents are supposed to consume. Update the scenario to emit the
  current contract explicitly:
    requested_search_mode = "hybrid"
    realized_search_mode  = "lexical"
    semantic_refinement   = false
    fallback_tier         = "lexical"
    fallback_reason       = "semantic assets not ready; lexical
                             fail-open served old-good generation"
- Add assertions in `robot_style_demo_is_deterministic_and_persists_artifacts`
  that read back the persisted snapshot file
  (`001-foreground_status_initial.json`) and verify each of the five
  fields above. `fallback_reason` check uses
  `.is_some_and(|reason| reason.contains("semantic assets not ready"))`
  so the test doesn't pin the exact prose but still proves the reason
  is diagnosable.

`.beads/issues.jsonl` + `.beads/last-touched` bump from br sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
